flows.name: tollgate
flows.description: Generic TollGate Bitcoin/Lightning payment gateway. Flashes stock OpenWrt, joins upstream WiFi, installs the tollgate backend, and configures the nodogsplash captive portal. For the branded portal UI, use the 'net4sats' flow instead.

upstream_ssid.description: Upstream WiFi SSID the router joins for internet

net4sats.shell:
#!/bin/sh
# conwrt flow: net4sats on asus-lyra-map-ac2200
# OpenWrt 24.10.7 · arm_cortex-a7 · opkg
# firmware: https://downloads.openwrt.org/releases/24.10.7/targets/ipq40xx/generic/openwrt-24.10.7-ipq40xx-generic-asus_map-ac2200-squashfs-sysupgrade.bin
set -e
IP=${IP:-192.168.1.1}

# --- Flash stock OpenWrt ---
# Put the router in U-Boot recovery and flash a stock OpenWrt image with conwrt. The remaining steps assume the router has rebooted to OpenWrt and is reachable at its default IP.
# flash with conwrt, e.g.: python3 scripts/conwrt.py --model-id asus-lyra-map-ac2200 --image <24.10.7 image>

# --- Connect the router to upstream WiFi ---
ssh root@$IP sh <<'CONWRT_EOF'
# WiFi STA uplink ({{upstream_band}}) — join upstream SSID
uci set wireless.radio1.disabled='0'
uci -q delete wireless.sta1; uci set wireless.sta1=wifi-iface
uci set wireless.sta1.device='radio1'
uci set wireless.sta1.mode='sta'
uci set wireless.sta1.ssid='{{upstream_ssid}}'
uci set wireless.sta1.encryption='psk2'
uci set wireless.sta1.key='{{upstream_key}}'
uci set wireless.sta1.network='wwan'
uci set wireless.default_radio1.disabled='1'
uci -q delete network.wwan; uci set network.wwan=interface
uci set network.wwan.proto='dhcp'
uci commit wireless
uci commit network
wifi reload
CONWRT_EOF

# --- Install the tollgate payment backend (v0.5.0-alpha3) ---
# no artifact URL for arch=arm_cortex-a7 (tollgate-wrt)

# --- Install the net4sats portal (configurationwizzard) ---
curl -L -o 'configurationwizzard.ipk' 'https://github.com/net4sats/configurationwizzard/releases/download/net4sats-portal-3e05134/configurationwizzard.ipk'
scp -O 'configurationwizzard.ipk' root@192.168.1.1:/tmp/configurationwizzard.ipk
ssh root@$IP sh <<'CONWRT_EOF'
# install configurationwizzard (opkg)
opkg install /tmp/configurationwizzard.ipk
CONWRT_EOF

# --- Brand the captive portal as net4sats ---
ssh root@$IP sh <<'CONWRT_EOF'
# --- TollGate: nodogsplash captive portal ---
uci set nodogsplash.@nodogsplash[0].enabled='1'
uci set nodogsplash.@nodogsplash[0].gatewayname='net4sats'
uci set nodogsplash.@nodogsplash[0].clientid='mac'
uci add_list nodogsplash.@nodogsplash[0].users_to_router='allow tcp port 2121'
uci add_list nodogsplash.@nodogsplash[0].users_to_router='allow tcp port 2050'
uci commit nodogsplash
/etc/init.d/nodogsplash enable
/etc/init.d/nodogsplash restart

# --- TollGate: hotplug (wwan ifup \u2192 tollgate restart) ---
mkdir -p /etc/hotplug.d/iface && printf '%s' '#!/bin/sh
[ "$ACTION" = "ifup" ] || exit 0
[ "$INTERFACE" = "wwan" ] || exit 0
logger -t tollgate-hotplug "wwan up \u2014 restarting tollgate"
/etc/init.d/tollgate-wrt restart &
' > /etc/hotplug.d/iface/95-tollgate-restart && chmod +x /etc/hotplug.d/iface/95-tollgate-restart

# --- TollGate: ipk installed separately via deploy_tollgate_post_flash() ---
CONWRT_EOF
net4sats.markdown:
# net4sats on Lyra MAP-AC2200 tri-band WiFi mesh node (IPQ4019 + QCA9886)

> OpenWrt **24.10.7** · arch `arm_cortex-a7` · package manager `opkg`
>
> Firmware: `https://downloads.openwrt.org/releases/24.10.7/targets/ipq40xx/generic/openwrt-24.10.7-ipq40xx-generic-asus_map-ac2200-squashfs-sysupgrade.bin`

## Flash stock OpenWrt

Put the router in U-Boot recovery and flash a stock OpenWrt image with conwrt. The remaining steps assume the router has rebooted to OpenWrt and is reachable at its default IP.

```sh
# flash with conwrt, then SSH back in once the router is at 192.168.1.1
python3 scripts/conwrt.py --model-id asus-lyra-map-ac2200 --image <firmware.bin>
```

## Connect the router to upstream WiFi

Configure the selected radio as a WiFi client (STA) so the router has internet for package installs.

### WiFi STA uplink ({{upstream_band}}) — join upstream SSID

```sh
uci set wireless.radio1.disabled='0'
uci -q delete wireless.sta1; uci set wireless.sta1=wifi-iface
uci set wireless.sta1.device='radio1'
uci set wireless.sta1.mode='sta'
uci set wireless.sta1.ssid='{{upstream_ssid}}'
uci set wireless.sta1.encryption='psk2'
uci set wireless.sta1.key='{{upstream_key}}'
uci set wireless.sta1.network='wwan'
uci set wireless.default_radio1.disabled='1'
uci -q delete network.wwan; uci set network.wwan=interface
uci set network.wwan.proto='dhcp'
uci commit wireless
uci commit network
wifi reload
```

## Install the tollgate payment backend (v0.5.0-alpha3)

```sh
# no artifact URL for arch=arm_cortex-a7 (tollgate-wrt)
```

## Install the net4sats portal (configurationwizzard)

```sh
curl -L -o 'configurationwizzard.ipk' 'https://github.com/net4sats/configurationwizzard/releases/download/net4sats-portal-3e05134/configurationwizzard.ipk'
scp -O 'configurationwizzard.ipk' root@192.168.1.1:/tmp/configurationwizzard.ipk
```

### install configurationwizzard (opkg)

```sh
opkg install /tmp/configurationwizzard.ipk
```

## Brand the captive portal as net4sats

Configures nodogsplash as the captive portal, restarts tollgate when the WiFi STA comes up, and sets the gateway name shown to clients to net4sats.

### TollGate: nodogsplash captive portal

```sh
uci set nodogsplash.@nodogsplash[0].enabled='1'
uci set nodogsplash.@nodogsplash[0].gatewayname='net4sats'
uci set nodogsplash.@nodogsplash[0].clientid='mac'
uci add_list nodogsplash.@nodogsplash[0].users_to_router='allow tcp port 2121'
uci add_list nodogsplash.@nodogsplash[0].users_to_router='allow tcp port 2050'
uci commit nodogsplash
/etc/init.d/nodogsplash enable
/etc/init.d/nodogsplash restart
```

### TollGate: hotplug (wwan ifup \u2192 tollgate restart)

```sh
mkdir -p /etc/hotplug.d/iface && printf '%s' '#!/bin/sh
[ "$ACTION" = "ifup" ] || exit 0
[ "$INTERFACE" = "wwan" ] || exit 0
logger -t tollgate-hotplug "wwan up \u2014 restarting tollgate"
/etc/init.d/tollgate-wrt restart &
' > /etc/hotplug.d/iface/95-tollgate-restart && chmod +x /etc/hotplug.d/iface/95-tollgate-restart
```

### TollGate: ipk installed separately via deploy_tollgate_post_flash()
